plugins.name: GitHub Issues
plugins.description: Attach GitHub issues to projects and resolve them as external context.

plugins.name: PlanNotator
plugins.description: Human code review via PlanNotator. Opens the review tool and optionally fetches the result to resolve the review gate.

plugins.name: RoboRev
plugins.description: AI-assisted code review via RoboRev.io. Opens the review in the browser. Gate resolution is manual.
